title: Linux User Perspectives on Operating Systems 2008-2009
description: The study investigated the views of Finnish Linux users on three operating systems: Windows, Mac OS X and Linux. The respondents' images of operating systems were charted by asking them to rate each OS on a semantic differential scale (seven-point scale between opposite adjectives, e.g. "easy to use - difficult to use", "just - unjust"). Further questions charted participation in the Linux community, and the respondents were asked whether Linux was their primary operating system, which Linux dis
